TweakerWarning: Botsepegi jwa Windows bo kgona go nna jwa senyegile ka tiriso ya {0}. Tseelela Windows gape o dirisa setshwantsho sa ISO se se tlhometseng fela.
TweakWhy_AccountProtectionWarn: Windows Security e bontsha tlhagiso fa o sa tsena ka akhaonto ya Microsoft. Go tima go fitlha kitsiso e e boelediwang.
TweakWhy_ActiveHours: E tlhalosa lobaka lo ka lona Windows e sa tla go simolola gape PC ka otomatiki go fetsa go tsenya dintlafatso.
TweakWhy_ActivityHistory: E kwala tiro ya gago mo didirisweng fa o tsena ka akhaonto ya Microsoft mme e ka e romela kwa leruring. Go tima go tshegetsa tiro mo tikologong.
TweakWhy_AdminApprovalMode: E laola ka fa User Account Control e dirang ka teng fa apolikasheno e kopa ditshwanelo tse di godimo. Tlhaolo e kopa tumalano, Never e tima dikgopolo tsa UAC. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama tsela e mengwe ya tiro.
TweakWhy_AdobeNetworkBlock: Adds firewall rules to block Adobe applications from accessing the internet. This affects licence validation, cloud sync, and Creative Cloud features. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_AdvancedStartupShortcut: E dira shortcut ya desktop e e simololang gape PC ka bonako go tsena mo menung ya Advanced Startup Options (Windows Recovery Environment).
TweakWhy_AdvertisingID: Windows e abela akhaonto ya gago ID e e kgethegileng ya papatso e diapolikasheno di ka e dirisang go bontsha dipapatso tse di lebisitsweng. Go tima go emisa go sala morago mo.
TweakWhy_AeroShaking: Go tshikinya sebaka sa setlhogo sa window go fokotsa mawindow otlhe a mangwe a a bulegileng. Tima fa o fitlhela se se diragala ka phoso mo tirisong ya ka metlha.
TweakWhy_AppColorMode: Sets the default colour mode that applications use when they respect the system setting: Dark or Light.
TweakWhy_AppsLanguageSwitch: E letla Windows gore e gakologelwe le go fetolela puo e sele ya go tsenya kgotsa sebopego sa keyboard ka phasalatso ka ngwe ya application.
TweakWhy_AppsSilentInstalling: Windows can silently install suggested apps in the background without asking you. Disabling stops this behaviour. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_AppsSmartScreen: SmartScreen e tlhola difaele le ditiriso tse di laisolotsweng kgatlhanong le polokelotshedimosetso ya botumo jwa kwa marung mme e go tlhagisa pele ga o dirisa di-executable tse di sa itsiweng. Phetogo eno e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dithulaganyo dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_Autoplay: E laola gore a Windows e bula prompt ka boyona kgotsa e tsenya application fa o tsenya USB drive kgotsa media e nngwe e e ka tlosiwang.
TweakWhy_AutoRebootOnCrash: Fa Windows e wa (blue screen), e ka itirela go simolola sešwa. Go e tima go boloka phoso mo skirinong gore o kgone go bala stop code.
TweakWhy_BackgroundApps: E laola gore a di-apps di letleletswe go dira le go thlabololwa kwa morago fa di sa lebagantswe. Go di tima go boloka CPU le memori. Se ke phetogo e e kotsi e e ka bonalang e thata kgotsa e sa kgonege go fetolwa.
TweakWhy_BingSearch: Lebokoso la go batla la Start Menu le ka bontsha dipholo tsa web tsa Bing mmogo le dipholo tsa selegae. Go e tima go boloka Start Menu search e le selegae fela.
TweakWhy_BootRecovery: E laola gore a Windows e tsena ka bonosi mo recovery mode morago ga go palelwa ga go simolola ga dinako tse di latelanang. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_BraveDebloat: E tima dilo tse di oketsegileng tsa Brave browser: rewards, crypto wallet, VPN, le AI chat. E ama fela dikarolo tseno tsa Brave, e seng go browser ga gago. Se ke phetogo e e kotsi e e ka bonalang e thata kgotsa e sa kgonege go fetolwa.
TweakWhy_BSoDStopError: E bontsha nomoro e e rileng ya phoso mo blue screen of death mo boemong jwa go bontsha fela emoji e e hutsafetseng.
TweakWhy_BuildNumberOnDesktop: E bontsha nomoro ya kago ya Windows le khutlo jaaka letshwao la metsi mo khoneng e e kwa tlase mo go la moja la desktop ya gago.
TweakWhy_CABInstallContext: E oketsa kgetho ya Install mo menu ya konteksi ya tobetsa-ga-moja ya difaele tsa arikhaefe tsa .cab.
TweakWhy_Camera: Konopo e kgolo e e laolang gore a di-apps di ka kopa phitlhelelo go khamera ya gago. Go e tima go thibela di-apps tsotlhe go dirisa khamera. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_CapsLock: E laola gore a konopo ya Caps Lock e a bereka. Go e tima go fetolela konopo ya Caps Lock gore go e gatelela go se dire sepe.
TweakWhy_ChangingSoundScheme: E laola gore a badirisi ba ka fetola leanô la modumo la Windows. Go tima se go kgwaologa leanô la jaanong le go thibela diphetogo.
TweakWhy_CheckBoxes: E bontsha dibokoso tse dinnye tsa go tshwaya go bapa le difaele le difolotara mo Explorer go dira gore go nne motlhofo go tlhopha dilo di le dintsi ntle le go tshwara Ctrl.
TweakWhy_CheckWinGet: WinGet ke molaodi wa sephuthelwana se se ageletsweng sa Windows se se dirisiwang go tsenya le go tlhabolola ditiriso go tswa mo moleng wa taelo. Seno se netefatsa gore e tsentswe le gore e mo nakong.
TweakWhy_CIMemoryIntegrity: Hypervisor-protected code integrity e dirisa code ya Windows kernel mo tikologong e e dirilweng go thibela kernel-level malware le rootkits. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_ClearRecentFiles: E phimola ka bonosi lenaane la difaele tse di sa tswang go dirisiwa nako nngwe le nngwe fa o tswa. E tokafatsa sephiri mo metshining e e abelanwang kgotsa e e nang le badirisi ba bantsi.
TweakWhy_ClipboardHistory: E boloka hisetori ya dilo tse di kopisitsweng gore o kgone go pasetere go tswa go di-clips tsa maloba o dirisa Win+V. Tshwaya go bulela tiriso ena.
TweakWhy_CompressedFolderNewContext: E bontsha kgotsa e fitlha kgetho ya Compressed (zipped) Folder mo submenu ya New ya tobetsa-ga-moja mo File Explorer.
TweakWhy_ConnectionSharing: E letla PC e go abelana kgolagano ya yona ya inthanete le didirisiwa tse dingwe, e dira jaaka hotspot ya softwere. Go e bulela go bontsha kgetho e mo diseting tsa network. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_ControlPanelView: E beya setaele sa go bontsha sa tlholego sa Control Panel go nna Large Icons, Small Icons, kgotsa go kgaoganngwa ka Category ga tlholego.
TweakWhy_Copilot: E tlosa Copilot, Recall, le dikarolo tsotlhe tse di amanang le Windows AI. Go di tsenya sešwa go tlhoka winget kgotsa phitlhelelo ya Microsoft Store.
TweakWhy_CortanaAutostart: E thibela Cortana go simologa ka bonosi fa go simololwa. Cortana e sa ntse e ka bulwa ka seatla fa go tlhokega.
TweakWhy_CreateRestorePoint: E bopa Windows System Restore point gore o kgone go boela morago mo diphetogong tsa system fa sengwe se sa tsamaya sentle. Go a kgothalediwa pele o dira di-tweak dipe.
TweakWhy_CrossDeviceResume: E go letla go tswelela ka ditiro go tswa go didirisiwa tse dingwe tsa Windows mo PC eno ka notification pop-up. Tima fa o sa dirise tiriso ena ya didirisiwa-go-kgabaganya.
TweakWhy_CurrentNetwork: E beya poraofaele ya network ya kgolagano ya gago e e dirang gompieno. Private e bulela go bona le go abelana ga network, Public e a go thibela. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DefaultTerminalApp: E beya gore application efe ya terminal e bulega fa o tsenya Command Prompt kgotsa PowerShell go tswa mo Windows.
TweakWhy_DefenderAppGuard: E bula mathapi a Edge browser mo motshineng o o ikgethileng wa seyenne go thibela diwebsaete tse di bosula go fitlhelela system ya mong kgotsa difaele tsa yona. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DefenderCloud: E bulela tshireletso ya Microsoft Defender e e theilweng mo leru bakeng sa go batla dikgatelelo tsa nako ya mmatota go dirisa database ya Microsoft ya botlhale jwa dikgatelelo. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DefenderSandbox: E dirisa enjene ya Microsoft Defender antivirus mo teng ga sandbox process e e ikgethileng bakeng sa tshireletso e nngwe. E oketsa morwalo o monnye wa tiragatso. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DefenderTrayIcon: E bontsha kgotsa e fitlha setshwantsho sa Windows Security (Defender) mo system tray. Go se fitlha ga go time tshireletso ya Defender.
TweakWhy_DeliveryOptimization: Windows e ka dirisa PC ya gago go abelana ka data ya Windows Update le di-PC tse dingwe mo network ya gago kgotsa inthaneteng. Go e tima go boloka di-download tsa gago di le sephiri. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DEPOptOut: E beya Data Execution Prevention go OptOut mode, e bulela tshireletso ya DEP mo di-process tsotlhe ntle le tse o di ntshang o le nosi. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DiagnosticDataLevel: E laola gore ke bokae jwa data ya tlhatlhobo e Windows e e romelang go Microsoft. Minimal e romela fela tshedimosetso ya motheo ya sedirisiwa le data ya go ikanyega.
TweakWhy_DiagTrackService: DiagTrack service e phutha le go tlhatlhosa data ya tiriso le ya tlhatlhobo ya Windows go di-server tsa Microsoft. Go e tima go emisa go tlhatlhoga ga telemetry kwa morago. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DisableAESCiphers: E tima di-entry tsa AES cipher tse di bokoa tse di kgologolo mo karolong ya tshireletso ya Windows SCHANNEL. E patelela di-application go buisanya ditlhophiso tsa cipher tse di nonofileng. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DisableAutoRun: E thibela Windows go dirisa mananeo ka bonosi mo USB drives le media e nngwe e e ka tlosiwang. E emisa tsela e e tlwaelegileng ya go anamisa malware.
TweakWhy_DisableHashAlgorithms: E rulaganya ditlhophiso tsa SCHANNEL hash algorithm. E tima MD5 le go bulela di-algorithm tsa lelapa la SHA bakeng sa go tlhomamisa bolotlolo jo bo nonofileng. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DisableIPv6: E tima IPv6 protocol stack go tsenelela tsamaiso yotlhe. Go a kgothalediwa fa network ya gago e sa dirise IPv6 go fokotsa bogolo jwa tlhaselo jo bo sa tlhokegeng. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DisableRC2RC4Ciphers: E tima di-cipher tsa RC2 le RC4 mo SCHANNEL. Di-algorithm tseno di senyegile ka cryptography mme ga di a tshwanela go dirisiwa mo kgolaganong epe ya TLS. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DisableRemoteCommands: DCOM ke protocol ya go thusa ka kgakala e e tlhokwang ke didirisiwa tsa taolo ya kgwebo (SCCM, WMI). Go e tima go fokotsa bogolo jwa tlhaselo mme go ka senya ditiro tsa taolo ya kgakala.
TweakWhy_DisableSMBv3Compression: E tima SMB compression go sireletsa mo CVE-2020-0796. E ama fela sephethephethe sa SMB se se kgobokanngwang, e seng lebelo la go fitlhelela difaele. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DisableTCPTimestamps: E tlosa tshedimosetso ya TCP timestamp mo di-packet tsa network. E thibela di-system tsa kgakala go tlhaloganya OS ya gago go ikaegile ka nako ya go bereka. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DisableTripleDESCipher: E tima Triple DES (3DES) mo SCHANNEL. 3DES e bonolo mo ditlhaselong tsa SWEET32 birthday mme ga e sa tlhole e tseelwa e le e e babalesegileng. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DiskCleanup: E dirisa sedirisiwa se se agilweng sa Windows Disk Cleanup go tlosa difaele tsa nakwana, cache ya system, le data e nngwe e e sa tlhokegeng go bulela sebaka sa disk. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DismissMSAccount: E tlosa kopo e e boelediwang mo Windows Security e e go kopang gore o tsene ka akhaonto ya Microsoft bakeng sa tshireletso e e oketsegileng.
TweakWhy_DismissSmartScreenFilter: E tlosa kopo e e boelediwang mo Windows Security e e go kopang gore o bulele SmartScreen reputation filter.
TweakWhy_DNSoverHTTPS: E fetolela di-lookup tsa DNS ka go di romela ka HTTPS mo boemong jwa UDP e e bulegileng. E thibela ISP kgotsa network ya gago go lebelela kgotsa go senya sephethephethe sa DNS. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_DownloadBlocking: E laola gore a Windows Security e tshwaya difaele tse di laotsweng jaaka tse di ka nnang di sa sireletsega e dirisa Zone.Identifier alternate data stream.
TweakWhy_EdgeDebloat: E dirisa ditlhophiso tsa Group Policy go tima telemetry, shopping assistant, collections, Copilot sidebar, le dilo tse dingwe tse di oketsegileng tsa Edge. Se ke phetogo e e kotsi e e ka bonalang e thata kgotsa e sa kgonege go fetolwa.
TweakWhy_EditWithClipchampContext: E bontsha kgotsa e fitlha kgetho ya Edit with Clipchamp video editor mo menu ya konteksi ya tobetsa-ga-moja ya difaele tsa bidio.
TweakWhy_EditWithPaintContext: E bontsha kgotsa e fitlha kgetho ya Edit with Paint mo menu ya konteksi ya tobetsa-ga-moja ya difaele tsa ditshwantsho.
TweakWhy_EditWithPhotosContext: E bontsha kgotsa e fitlha kgetho ya Edit with Photos mo menu ya konteksi ya tobetsa-ga-moja ya difaele tsa ditshwantsho.
TweakWhy_EnableBiometricsAntiSpoofing: E bulela anti-spoofing e e tokafaditsweng bakeng sa Windows Hello ya go lemoga sefatlhego. E ama fela fa o na le biometric hardware e e tshwanang.
TweakWhy_EnableSMBGuestCompatibility: E letla dikgolagano tsa SMB le go abelanwa ga network ntle le go tlhoka tlhomamisego. E tlhokega bakeng sa go fitlhelela didirisiwa tsa NAS tse di kgologolo, diphrintara, kgotsa di-router. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_EncCompFilesColor: E bontsha difaele tse di fetotsweng ka nomoro ka botala jwa legae le difaele tse di kgobokantsweng ka botala jwa loapi mo File Explorer. E dira gore mefuta eno ya difaele e bonale ka bonako.
TweakWhy_EnhPointerPrecision: Mouse acceleration e e fetolang lebelo la kgopolo go ikaegile ka gore o tsamaya mouse ka lebelo le le kae. Tima bakeng sa go tsenya ga mouse go go tsamaelelang, go kgothalediwa bakeng sa dipapadi.
TweakWhy_ErrorReporting: Fa application e wa, Windows Error Reporting e ka romela pego go Microsoft. Go e tima go emisa data eno go tswa mo motshining wa gago.
TweakWhy_EventViewerCustomView: E bopa pono e e ikgethileng mo Event Viewer e e tlhagisitsweng go bontsha ditiragalo tsa go bopa process, e dira gore go nne motlhofo go lebelela mananeo a a tsentsweng.
TweakWhy_ExplorerAutoDiscovery: File Explorer e lemoga mofuta wa diteng wa folotara nngwe le nngwe mme e dirisa template ya pono e e tshwanang. Go e tima go lotlela difolotara tsotlhe go pono e e tshwanang e e tlwaelegileng.
TweakWhy_ExplorerTitleFullPath: E bontsha tsela yotlhe ya folotara mo mothalong wa setlhogo wa File Explorer mo boemong jwa go bontsha fela leina la folotara. Go thusa fa o bereka ka difolotara di le dintsi tsa leina le le tshwanang.
TweakWhy_F1HelpPage: Go tobetsa F1 mo File Explorer kgotsa mo desktop go bula website ya thuso ya Windows mo browser ya gago. Go e tima go thibela go bulwa ga browser eno.
TweakWhy_F8BootMenu: E bulela menu ya kgale ya konopo ya F8 ya boot e e go letlang go tlhopha Safe Mode le dikgetho tse dingwe tsa go simolola mo nakong ya tsamaiso ya boot ya Windows.
TweakWhy_FastStartup: Mokgwa wa go tima wa motswako o o bolokang seemo sa kernel mo disk gore Windows e simolole ka bonako. E ka baka mathata ka ditlhomamiso tsa dual-boot kgotsa go tima ka botlalo.
TweakWhy_FeedbackFrequency: E laola gore Windows e go kopa ga kae go lekanyetsa maitemogelo a gago kgotsa go romela dikakanyo. Go e beya go Never go emisa dikopo tsotlhe tsa dikakanyo.
TweakWhy_FileDeleteConfirm: E bontsha lebokoso la tlhomamiso pele o phimola faele ka bosakhutleng. Bulela go bona lebokoso pele difaele di romelwa go Recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_FileExplorerCompactMode: E fokotsa sebaka magareng ga dilo mo File Explorer bakeng sa pono ya lenaane e e kotlaneng, e humileng ka tshedimosetso.
TweakWhy_FileExtensions: E bontsha khutlo ya faele (mohlala .txt, .exe) morago ga leina lengwe le lengwe la faele mo Explorer. E thusa go itse gore faele ke ya mofuta ofe ka bonako.
TweakWhy_FileOperationsDetails: E bontsha lebokoso le le feletseng la kgatelopele ya ditiro tsa difaele (go kopisa, go suta, go phimola) ka tlholego mo boemong jwa mothalo o monnye wa kgatelopele.
TweakWhy_FileTransferDialog: E laola gore a lebokoso la go kopisa le go suta faele le bontshe dintlha tse di feletseng tsa lebelo le nako e e setseng ka tlholego.
TweakWhy_Firewall: E bulela kgotsa e tima Windows Defender Firewall go kgabaganya di-profile tsotlhe tsa network. Go e tima go tlogela di-port tsotlhe tsa go tsena di sa tlhatlhobiwe. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama ditiro tse dingwe.
TweakWhy_FirstLogonAnimation: E bontsha motshameko o mokhutshwane wa katlholo le skirini sa Hi lekgetlo la ntlha fa o tsena morago ga tokafatso e kgolo ya Windows.
TweakWhy_FldrSeparateProcess: E bula letlhomeso lengwe le lengwe la folotara ya Explorer mo process ya lona. Fa lengwe le wa, tse dingwe di dula di butswe. E dirisa memori e nnye e oketsegileng.
TweakWhy_FolderGroupBy: E laola gore a difaele tsa folotara ya Downloads di kgaoganngwa ka letsatsi le di fetotsweng ka lone. Go e beya go None go bontsha difaele tsotlhe mo lenaaneng le le rapameng.
TweakWhy_FullscreenOptimizations: A Windows feature that optimises games and apps running in fullscreen mode for better performance. Disabling can fix compatibility issues in some older games.
TweakWhy_GameDVR: Go gatisa ga morago ga seemo go tshwara metshameko ka metlha gore o kgone go boloka metsotso ya bofelo morago ga sengwe se diragala. Go tima go golola didirisiwa tsa GPU le disk gore go nne le FPS e e tlhomameng.
TweakWhy_GPUScheduling: Hardware-accelerated GPU scheduling e letla GPU go laola memori ya yona ya bidio ka tlhamalalo, e ka nnang ya fokotsa bosego jwa go tsenya mo dipapading.
TweakWhy_Hibernation: E boloka diteng tsotlhe tsa RAM mo disk mme e tima PC ka botlalo. Faele ya hibernation e ka dirisa di-gigabyte di le mmalwa tsa sebaka sa disk.
TweakWhy_HiddenItems: E bontsha difaele le di-folder tse di tshwailweng go fitlhega mo File Explorer. Dilo tse di fitlhegileng di bonala di le tala fa di bonala.
TweakWhy_HomeGroups: Home Groups e ne e le tiriso ya Windows ya go abelana difaele magareng ga di-PC tsa gae. E ne ya tloswa mo Windows 10 1803 mme ditirelo tse di setseng di ka nna di santse di le teng.
TweakWhy_ImportExploitProtectionPolicy: E laola le go tlisa faele ya pholisi ya go thibela tshotlo e e agilweng sentle mo Windows Defender Exploit Guard, e dirisa dithibelo tsa dithulaganyo tse di tlhamilweng. Se ke phetogo ya kotsi e kgolo e e ka nnang thata kgotsa go sa kgonegeng go e fetola morago.
TweakWhy_InputMethod: E beakanya mokgwa wa tlhaelelo wa khiboto o Windows o o dirisang. Seesimane se pateletsa thulaganyo ya Seesimane go sa kgathalesege dipuo tse dingwe tse di tsentseng.
TweakWhy_JPEGWallpapersQuality: Windows e pitlaganya di-wallpaper tsa JPEG fa e di dira bokamoraga jwa desktop. Go beakanya go Max go boloka boleng jwa setshwantsho ka botlalo.
TweakWhy_LanguageListAccess: E letlelela diwebosaete go bala lenaane la dipuo tsa Windows gore di dire diteng ka tsela e e lebaneng. Tima go thibela diwebosaete go lemoga dipeakanyo tsa gago tsa puo.
TweakWhy_LanmanWorkstationGuestAuthPolic: Tlhomamiso ya moeng ya SMB ke tsela e e itsegeng ya go tsamaya fa thoko e e timilweng ka botlhokwa go tloga ka Windows 10 1709. Go e tsenya go tlhagisa thulaganyo mo kgokagong ya SMB e e sa tlhomamisiwang. E tsenye fela go tsamaelana le ditsamaiso tsa bogologolo.
TweakWhy_LatestInstalled.NET: E pateletsa ditirisiwa tsa 32-bit le 64-bit go dirisa mofuta o moša o o tsentsweng wa .NET runtime go na le mofuta o di agilweng mo go ona.
TweakWhy_LLMNR: Link-Local Multicast Name Resolution e rarabolola maina a di-host mo dinetweke tsa seleng. E ka dirisiwa mo ditlhaselong tsa go tshwara ditshupo mme go botoka go e tima. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama tsela tse dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_LocalSecurityAuthority: E dira thulaganyo ya Windows LSA mo mokgweng o o sireletsegileng go thibela bogodu jwa ditshupo ka didirisiwa tse di jaaka Mimikatz. E kgothaletswa mo ditsamaisong tsotlhe. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama tsela tse dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_LocationService: E laola gore a di-app di ka fitlhelela lefelo la geographic la sediriswa sa gago. Go tima go thibela go latediwa ga lefelo ke di-app tsotlhe. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama tsela tse dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_LockScreen: E laola gore a skrine sa go lotlela sa Windows se bontshiwa pele ga skrine sa go tsena mo Windows 11.
TweakWhy_LockScreenBlur: E dirisa tiriso ya acrylic blur mo bokamoraga jwa skrine sa go tsena. Go tima go bontsha bokamoraga ntle le blur.
TweakWhy_LockScreenRS1: E laola gore a skrine sa go lotlela sa Windows se bontshiwa pele ga skrine sa go tsena mo Windows 10 (tsela ya pholisi ya nako ya RS1).
TweakWhy_LockWidgets: Windows Web Experience Pack e oketsa di-widget le diteng tse di fetogang mo skrineng sa go lotlela le mo taskbar. Go tima go tlosa tse.
TweakWhy_MaintenanceWakeUp: Windows e ka tsosa PC ya gago mo borokong bosigo go dira ditiro tsa maintenance tsa boeteledipele. Go tima go thibela go tsoga go go sa eletsegeng bosigo.
TweakWhy_MapUpdates: Windows Maps e ka laola ka boyona go laisa data e ntšha ya mmapa wa offline kwa morago. Go tima go boloka bandwidth fa o sa dirise Maps app.
TweakWhy_MeetNow: Setshwantsho sa Meet Now mo lefelong la dikitsiso
TweakWhy_MergeConflicts: E bontsha tlhagiso fa go kopanngwa di-folder tse di nang le difaele tse di nang le leina le le lengwe. Tima go pitlaganya difaele ntle le tlhagiso.
TweakWhy_Microphone: Sekwetlhi se segolo se se laolang gore a di-app di ka kopa go fitlhelela microphone ya gago. Go tima go thibela di-app tsotlhe go dirisa mic. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama tsela tse dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_MostUsedApps: E bontsha di-app tse di dirisiwang thata kwa godimo ga lenaane la di-app la Start Menu gore di fitlhelelwe ka bonako.
TweakWhy_MostUsedStartApps: Di-app tse di dirisiwang thata mo Start
TweakWhy_MouseAcceleration: Enhance Pointer Precision e fetola motsamao wa mouse go ya ka lebelo. Go tima go fa kgokagano ya 1:1 ya raw input e e ratwang ke batshameki ba FPS ba kgaisano gore go nne le go nepa go go tlhomameng.
TweakWhy_MSIExtractContext: E oketsa kgetho ya Extract mo menung ya tobetsa-ya-moja ya difaele tsa .msi installer, e go letlelela go leba diteng tsa tsona ntle le go dirisa installer.
TweakWhy_MSNetClient: Moreki wa Microsoft Networks o o letlelelang PC e go fitlhelela difaele le diphrintara tse di abelanngwang ke dikhomputara tse dingwe tsa Windows mo netweke. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama tsela tse dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_MultiplaneOverlay: Tiriso ya GPU compositing e e ka tokafatsang tiriso. Go tima go ka baakanya diphoso tsa pono kgotsa go phatshima mo dipeakanyong dingwe tsa pontsho.
TweakWhy_MultipleInvokeContext: Fa go tlhophiwa difaele di le 15 kgotsa go feta mme go tobediwa ka moja, Windows ka tlwaelo e bontsha tlhagiso pele ga go bontsha menu ya go tshwarana. Se se oketsa kgotsa go tlosa moeno oo.
TweakWhy_NaglesAlgorithm: E fokotsa go bolokwa ga netweke gore di-packet di romelwe ka bonako. E ka fokotsa latency mo metshamekong ya batho ba bantsi ya kgaisano, mme e ka ama go tsepama ga kgokagano mo dinetweke dingwe. Tima fa o lemoga go wa ga kgokagano.
TweakWhy_NavigationPaneExpand: Sekale sa kgogediso sa Explorer se iphetola ka boyona mme se menoga go tlhagisa folder e o e lebang gone jaanong.
TweakWhy_NavPaneAllFolders: E bontsha di-folder tsotlhe tsa seleng go akaretsa di-folder tsa thulaganyo tse di fitlhegileng mo sekaleng sa kgogediso sa molema sa Explorer.
TweakWhy_NavPaneLibraries: E bontsha karolo ya Libraries (Documents, Music, Pictures, Videos) mo sekaleng sa kgogediso sa molema sa Explorer.
TweakWhy_NCSIProbe: Network Connectivity Status Indicator e tlhola kgokagano ka go tshwara diseva tsa Microsoft. Go tima go ka bontsha ditshwantsho tse di sa siamang tsa maemo a netweke. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama tsela tse dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_NetBIOS: NetBIOS ke molao wa bogologolo wa tharabololo ya leina o o dirisiwang go abelana difaele tsa Windows. Go tima mo dinetweke tsa segompieno go fokotsa sephetho se se sa tlhokegeng sa broadcast. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama tsela tse dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_NetDevicesAutoInst: E laola gore a Windows e laola ka boyona le go tsenya di-driver tsa didirisiwa tsa netweke tse di sa tswang go kgokagangwa.
TweakWhy_NetworkAdaptersSavePower: E letlelela Windows go baya di-adapter tsa netweke mo maemong a maatla a a kwa tlase fa di sa dirisiwe. Go tima go thibela ditiego tse dikhutshwane tsa go kgokagana sesha morago ga adapter e tsoga.
TweakWhy_NetworkDiscovery: E kgontsha PC e go bona didirisiwa tse dingwe mo netweke ya seleng le go bonwa ke tsona. E tlhokega go leba di-share tsa netweke mo File Explorer. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama tsela tse dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_NetworkFromLockScreen: E laola gore a konopo ya go tlhopha netweke e bonala mo skrineng sa go lotlela pele ga modirisi a tsena.
TweakWhy_NetworkProtection: Tshireletso ya neteweke ya Microsoft Defender e thibela dikgokelo ho di-domain tse tsebahalang tse kotsi le diaterese tsa IP boemong ba neteweke. Phetogo eno e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dithulaganyo dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_NewAppPrompt: Fa o leka go bula mofuta wa faele o o sa golaganngwang, Windows e bontsha puisanyo e e botsang ka fa o ka e bulang. Go tima go fedisa moeno oo.
TweakWhy_NewOutlook: E laola gore a app e ntšha ya Outlook e a bonagala. Tima go tswelela go dirisa di-app tsa Mail le Calendar tsa bogologolo.
TweakWhy_NewsInterests: Diteng tsa dikgang le bosa mo taskbar
TweakWhy_Notifications: Sekwetlhi se segolo sa thulaganyo yotlhe ya dikitsiso tsa Windows. Go tima go emisa dikitsiso tsotlhe tsa di-app mme go fitlha lefelo la dikitsiso. Se ke phetogo ya kotsi e kgolo e e ka nnang thata kgotsa go sa kgonegeng go e fetola morago.
TweakWhy_NTFSLastAccess: E mpshafatsa nako-sesupo mo faeleng nngwe le nngwe nako nngwe le nngwe fa e balwa. Go tima go fokotsa tiro ya go kwala ya disk mo ditsamaisong tse di nang le dipalo tse dintsi tsa go balwa ga difaele tse dinnye.
TweakWhy_NTFSLongPaths: E tlosa moeno wa 260-character mo ditseleng tsa difaele. E tlhokega go didirisiwa dingwe tsa tlhabololo le dithulaganyo tsa di-folder tse di tseneng boteng.
TweakWhy_NumLock: E laola gore a senotlolo sa Num Lock se tshwarwa ka boyona fa Windows e simolola. Kgontsha go simolola ka metlha ka pad ya dinomoro e le teng.
TweakWhy_OneDrive: E tsenya tlelaente ya go tsamaisanya ya desekethopo ya OneDrive, kgotsa e tlosa tiriswa le go kopanngwa ga yone ga Explorer. Tlosa ke kelelo ya tiro ya go tlosa sephuthelwana, e seng go fetoga go go bonolo, mme go se busetsa go ka tlhoka go dira thulaganyo gape, go saena gape, le go leta go tsamaisanya go boela mannong.
TweakWhy_OneDriveFileExplorerAd: OneDrive e bontsha kitsiso ya papatso mo teng ga File Explorer e go rotloetsa go tsamaisanya difaele. Go fitlha go tlosa benara eno.
TweakWhy_OpenFileExplorerTo: E beakanya lefelo la tlwaelo le File Explorer e le bulang fa e tsenngwa go tswa mo taskbar kgotsa Start Menu.
TweakWhy_OpenWindowsTerminalAdminContext: Bula Windows Terminal jaaka admin ka tlwaelo
TweakWhy_PerformanceTuning: Runs a set of legacy system optimisations and boot configuration adjustments to improve general system responsiveness. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_PowerPlan: E beakanya togamaano ya maatla ya Windows. Balanced e fetola tiro go ya ka mokgweleo. High Performance e boloka CPU mo lebelong le le feletseng. Ultimate Performance e tlosa dithibelo tsotlhe tsa go boloka maatla gore go nne le tiro e e feletseng. Ultimate Performance e ka tloga ya sa nne teng mo ditsamaisong tsotlhe.
TweakWhy_Powershell7Telemetry: PowerShell 7 e romela tshedimosetso ya tiriso e e sa itsiweng kwa Microsoft ka thulaganyetsoruri. Go thibela go tlhopha go tswa mo thelemetiri eno. E golagantswe le kgetho ya Tsenya/Ntšhwafatsa PowerShell 7.
TweakWhy_PowerShellModulesLogging: E rekota taelo nngwe le nngwe e e dirwang ke di-module tsa PowerShell mo lognyeng ya ditiragalo tsa Windows. E molemo mo go tlhatlhobeng tshireletso le go batlisisa ditiragalo.
TweakWhy_PowerShellScriptsLogging: E rekota diteng tsotlhe tsa block nngwe le nngwe ya script ya PowerShell e e tsamaisegang mo lognyeng ya ditiragalo tsa Windows. E thusa ka dipatlisiso tsa morago ga tiragalo.
TweakWhy_PreventEdgeShortcutCreation: E emisa Microsoft Edge go tlhama gape sekai sa yona sa desktop morago ga dimpshafatso. E dirisiwa go di-channel tsotlhe tsa go gololwa ga Edge.
TweakWhy_PrintCMDContext: E bontsha kgotsa go fitlha kgetho ya Print mo menung ya tobetsa-ya-moja ya difaele tsa script tsa .bat le .cmd.
TweakWhy_ProtectClickOnce: E tima dikopo tsa tshepo tsa ClickOnce go dikarolo tsotlhe tsa tshireletso. E thibela ditirisiwa tse di sa tshepagaleng tsa ClickOnce go kopa go tsenngwa. Se ke phetogo ya kotsi e kgolo e e ka nnang thata kgotsa go sa kgonegeng go e fetola morago.
TweakWhy_ProtectFileSystemPerformance: E tima go tlhamiwa ga maina a makhutshwane a 8.3 mo NTFS. E tokafatsa tiro ya thulaganyo ya difaele mme e tlosa tiriso ya bogologolo e e sa tlhokegeng thata gompieno.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOffice: E laola di-macro, go tsamaisega ga diteng tsa kwa ntle, le dipeakanyo tsa tshepo tsa Outlook mo mefuteng yotlhe ya Office. E fokotsa ditsela tsa tlhaselo tse di theilweng mo dikwalong. Se ke phetogo ya kotsi e kgolo e e ka nnang thata kgotsa go sa kgonegeng go e fetola morago.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOfficeLinks: E thibela Word go mpshafatsa ka boyona dikgokagano tsa kwa ntle mo dikwalong le mo emeileng. E fokotsa kotsi ya go ntshiwa ga data ka dikgokagano tse di kopantsweng tsa dikwalo. Se ke phetogo ya kotsi e kgolo e e ka nnang thata kgotsa go sa kgonegeng go e fetola morago.
TweakWhy_ProtectOS: Applies a broad set of registry hardening values covering credential protection, UAC, NTLM, TCP/IP, and smart card removal behaviour. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_ProtectRPCSurface: E tima RPC-over-TCP go Task Scheduler le Service Control Manager e e kgakala. E fokotsa go tlhagisega ga ditsela tsa tlhaselo tsa taolo ya kgakala. Se ke phetogo ya kotsi e kgolo e e ka nnang thata kgotsa go sa kgonegeng go e fetola morago.
TweakWhy_ProtectWinRM: E tima sephetho sa WinRM se se sa kwalolwang le tlhomamiso ya digest, morago ga moo e simolola sešwa tirelo ya WinRM. E netefatsa gore dikgokagano tsa taolo ya kgakala di kwalolwa ka metlha. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama tsela tse dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_PrtScnSnippingTool: E dira gore senotlolo sa Print Screen se bule Snipping Tool go tshwara skrine sa tirisanommogo go na le go kopa ka tidimalo mo clipboard.
TweakWhy_PUAppsDetection: E kgontsha Defender go bona le go tshwara ditirisiwa tse di sa batliweng tse di jaaka adware, bundleware, le dithibelo tsa browser. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama tsela tse dingwe tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_QoS: Quality of Service packet scheduler e ka baya kwa pele mefuta mengwe ya sephetho sa netweke. E tlhokega go ditiro dingwe tsa QoS tsa netweke gore di dire sentle.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessFrequentFolders: Karolo ya Quick Access mo Explorer e ka bontsha di-folder tse di etelwang thata. Fitlha go boloka Quick Access e bontsha fela di-folder tse di pinneng.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessRecentFiles: Karolo ya Quick Access mo Explorer e ka bontsha difaele tse di sa tswang go bulwa. Fitlha go boloka Quick Access e bontsha fela di-folder tse di pinneng.
TweakWhy_RazerBlock: E thibela di-script tsa installer tsa Razer Synapse go tsamaya ka boyona. E thibela software e e sa batliweng ya Razer go tsenngwa kwa morago. Se ke phetogo ya kotsi e kgolo e e ka nnang thata kgotsa go sa kgonegeng go e fetola morago.
TweakWhy_RecentFiles: E laola gore a Windows e latedisa difaele tse di sa tswang go fitlhelelwa gore di bontshiwe mo Quick Access le dipuisanyo tsa Open. Tima go emisa go latedisa.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedApps: E bontsha lenaane la di-app tse di sa tswang go tsenngwa mo Start Menu. Tima go boloka lenaane la di-app la Start Menu le le phepa.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedStartApps: Di-app tse di sa tswang go tsenngwa mo Start
TweakWhy_RecentShortcuts: E bontsha difaele le di-folder tse di sa tswang go fitlhelelwa le tse di fitlhelelwang gantsi jaaka dikai mo karolong ya Quick Access ya Explorer.
TweakWhy_RecommendedTroubleshooting: E laola gore a Windows e tsamaisa ka boyona di-troubleshooter fa mathata a lemogwa. Tlwaelo e santse e kopa tetla ya gago pele ga go tsamaisa.
TweakWhy_RecycleBinDeleteConfirmation: E bontsha moeno wa tlhomamiso pele ga go tlosa difaele go Recycle Bin. Kgontsha go thibela go tloswa ga difaele ka phoso.
TweakWhy_RegistryBackup: E kgontsha go bolokwa ga difaele tsa hive tsa registry tsa Windows ka boyona ka nako le nako mo folder ya RegBack ka fa gare ga Windows directory.
TweakWhy_RepairSharedPrinterConnectionEr: E baakanya diphoso tsa tlwaelo tsa kgokagano ya phrintara ya host le moreki ka go tsamaisa dipeakanyo tsa RPC, SMB, Point and Print, spooler, TCP, le go bonwa ga netweke. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e tlhoka go simolola sešwa.
TweakWhy_RepairWindows11SMBUpdateIssue: E baakanya bothata jo bo itsegeng mo go dingwe tsa diaga tsa Windows 11 moo go fitlhelela SMB share go paletswang morago ga tlhabololo ka ntlha ya boleng jwa registry jo bo tlhokegang.
TweakWhy_ReservedStorage: Windows e beela di-gigabyte di le mmalwa tsa sebaka sa disk go ditlhabololo, difaele tsa nakwana, le di-cache. Go tima go boela go tsaya sebaka se se beetsweng morago ga tlhabololo e e latelang. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_RestartDeviceAfterUpdate: E letla Windows go rulaganya go simolola sešwa ka bofefo jo bo kgonegang morago ga go fetsa go tsenya tlhabololo.
TweakWhy_RestartNotification: E bontsha kitsiso mo taskbar fa Windows Update e setse e tsentswe mme e tlhoka go simolola sešwa gore e fele.
TweakWhy_RestoreFldrWindows: E bula gape mafasetere a difolotara a Explorer a a neng a butswe fa o ne o tswa lwa bofelo. E busetsa bokao jwa tiro ya gago mo go tseneng mongwe le mongwe.
TweakWhy_RevertStartMenu: E busetsa Start Menu mo sebopegong sa pele-ga-24H2 mo diagong tsa Windows 11 24H2. E ka ama go tsamaisana le ditlhabololo tsa Windows tsa isago. E ke phetogo e e nang le kotsi e kgolo e e ka nnang thata kgotsa go se kgonege go e busa.
TweakWhy_S3Sleep: S3 ke boroko jo bo teng jwa setso moo PC e timang dikarolo ka botlalo. Dithulaganyo dingwe di simolola ka Modern Standby e e ka ntshang maatla fa e sa dira.
TweakWhy_SaveRestartableApps: Windows e ka boloka seemo sa di-app tse di butsweng fa o tswa mme e di bule gape ka boyone morago ga o tsena gape.
TweakWhy_SaveZoneInformation: Fa o laisolola faele mo inthaneteng, Windows e e tshwaya ka letshwao la kgaolo. Go boloka seno se kgontshitswe go letla ditlhagiso tsa tshireletsego fa o dirisa difaele tse di laisolotsweng.
TweakWhy_ScheduledTasks: Ditiro di le mmalwa tse di rulagantsweng di dira kwa morago go kgobokanya le go romela data ya tlhatlhobo. Go tima go emisa ditiro tse go dira ka boyone. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_SearchAppInStore: Fa o bula faele e e nang le leotwana le le sa itsiweng, Windows e ka akantsha go batla mo Microsoft Store. Go tima go tlola kakanyo e.
TweakWhy_SearchHighlights: Ditshupo tsa tlhotlhomiso mo Windows Search
TweakWhy_SelectCheckboxes: E tsenya di-checkbox fa thoko ga difaele le difolotara mo Explorer go nolofatsa go tlhopha tse di fetang e le nngwe kwa ntle ga go tshwara Ctrl.
TweakWhy_Sensors: E laola go fitlhelela di-sensor tsa hardware jaaka accelerometer, gyroscope, le sensor ya lesedi la tikologo. E amega thata ka di-tablet le didiriswa tse di fetolegang.
TweakWhy_ServicesManual: E beya tlhopho ya ditirelo tsa Windows tse di seng botlhokwa go tswa go Automatic go ya go Manual startup. Ditirelo di tla sa le di simolola fa di tlhokega. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_SetDefenderExploitGuardPolicy: E dirisa melao e mengwe ya Exploit Guard ya go fokotsa bogolo jwa tlhaselo ka Windows Defender go thibela mekgwa e e tlwaelegileng ya malware. E ke phetogo e e nang le kotsi e kgolo e e ka nnang thata kgotsa go se kgonege go e busa.
TweakWhy_SetDLLHijackingPrevention: E baakanya tatelano ya tlhotlhomiso ya DLL ya Session Manager go thibela dithapelo go tsenya di-DLL go tswa mafelong a a sa ikanyegeng. E tswala tsela e e tlwaelegileng ya tiriso ya malware. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_SetLOLBinFirewallRules: E tsenya melao ya go thibela ya firewall ya kwa ntle ya di-binary tsa Windows tse di tsenngwang tirisong go tlwaelega ke malware (LOLBins) go letsetsa gae kgotsa go laola diphutheo. E ke phetogo e e nang le kotsi e kgolo e e ka nnang thata kgotsa go se kgonege go e busa.
TweakWhy_SetNtpServerOverride: E phimola Nako ya Windows go dirisa pool.ntp.org boemong jwa sefara ya nako ya Windows ya thulaganyetsoruri.
TweakWhy_SetSMBSharingCompatibility: E boloka thulaganyo ya gago ya SMB share e e leng teng le ditshwayo tsa netweke tse di bolokilweng fa ditokafatso tse dingwe tsa netweke di dirisiwa. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_SettingsSuggestedContent: Thapelo ya Settings e ka bontsha dikakanyo le dikeletso tse di tshegeditsweng fa thoko ga dithulaganyo tsa gago. Go fitlha go tlosa dikakanyo tse tsa kgwebo.
TweakWhy_SetWindowsFirewallLogging: E kgontsha go rekhota dikgokagano tse di latlhilweng le tse di letlelelwang mo faeleng ya rekhoto ya Windows Firewall gore o kgone go sekaseka ditiragalo tsa netweke.
TweakWhy_SharedExperiences: E letla Windows go abelana tiragalo magareng ga didiriswa tsa gago ka akhaonto ya gago ya Microsoft. Go tima go boloka tiragalo mo mochining o fela.
TweakWhy_ShareMenu: E tsenya tlhopho ya Share mo menyu ya konteksete ya go tobetsa go ja la moja mo difaeleng, e go letla go di abelana ka dithapelo kgotsa Windows nearby sharing.
TweakWhy_SharingMappedDrives: E letla di-drive tsa netweke tse di mapiwang go bonwa ke dithapelo tse di godisitsweng (tsa bolaodi) le modirisi yo o tsentseng jaanong. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_SharingWizard: E kgontsha wizard e e nolofaditsweng ya go abelana difaele fa o tobetsa go ja la moja mo faeleng kgotsa folotareng mme o tlhopha go e abelana.
TweakWhy_ShortcutArrow: E bontsha kgotsa e fitlha setshwantsho se se nnye sa motswako wa setlhako mo difaeleng tsa ditshiamologo go supa gore ke ditshiamologo e seng difaele tsa ntlha.
TweakWhy_ShortcutsSuffix: E laola gore a Windows e tsenya - Shortcut mo leineng la ditshiamologo tse disha tse di dirilweng mo desktop.
TweakWhy_ShutdownFromLockScreen: E laola gore a dikonopo tsa go tima le go simolola sešwa di bonala mo skrineng sa go lotlela sa Windows.
TweakWhy_SigninInfo: E dirisa ditshwayo tsa gago tsa go tsena go fetsa go baakanya profaele ya gago ka boyone morago ga tlhabololo ya Windows. Tima gore o nne le sephiri sengwe.
TweakWhy_SleepButton: E laola gore a tlhopho ya Sleep e bonala mo Start Menu le gore a konopo ya Sleep mo khiboting e a bereka.
TweakWhy_SleepTimeout: E laola gore skrine e tima leng le gore PC e tsena mo borokong leng morago ga go sa dira sepe. Tima go thibela boroko jwa boyone.
TweakWhy_SMB1: SMBv1 ke protocol ya tlhakanelo ya difaele e e fetileng ke nako le e e nang le makoa a a itsegeng jaaka EternalBlue. Tima fa e se e tlhokega mo didiriswa tse di bogologolo tsa netweke. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_SMBServer: E kgontsha karolo ya SMB file server e e letlang dikhomphiutara tse dingwe mo netweke go fitlhelela difolotara tse di abelanweng le diphrinta mo PC e. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_SnapAssist: Fa o thuntsha lefasetere mo ntlheng nngwe, Windows e akantsha mafasetere a mangwe a a butsweng go tlatsa sebaka se se setseng. Tima go thuntsha kwa ntle ga dikakanyo.
TweakWhy_StandbyFix: Modern Standby (S0) can cause high CPU and power usage while the PC appears to be sleeping. This fix switches to S3-style deep sleep behaviour.
TweakWhy_StartAccountNotifications: Microsoft e ka bontsha dikitsiso le dipotso tse di amanang le akhaonto mo Menyung wa Tshimologo. Go iphitlha go tlosa tseno.
TweakWhy_StartLayout: E laola kelelo ya sebopego sa Start Menu ya Windows 11 magareng ga di-app tse di kgomaretsweng le dikakanyo.
TweakWhy_StartMenuAllSectionCategories: Karolo yotlhe le magoro mo Start (24H2+)
TweakWhy_StartRecommendationsTips: Start Menu e ka bontsha dikakanyo ka didirisiwa tsa Windows le dikakanyo tsa di-app tse disha. Go fitlha go tlosa dikakanyo tse.
TweakWhy_StartRecommendedSection: E bontsha kgotsa e fitlha karolo ya Recommended kwa tlase ga Start Menu. Mo dikhatisong tsa Enterprise le Education se se ka fitlhwa ka pholisi.
TweakWhy_StartupSound: E tshameka modumo wa go simolola wa Windows fa desktop e tsena morago ga o tsena.
TweakWhy_StickyShift: Go tobetsa Shift gataro ka bonako go tsenya dialog ya Sticky Keys ya bonolo jwa tiriso. Tima go thibela se go kgoreletsa tiro ya gago.
TweakWhy_StorageSense: E gololesa sebaka sa disk ka boyone ka thulaganyo ka go phimola difaele tsa nakwana, di-download tsa kgale, le diteng tsa Recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_Superfetch: SysMain e tsenya di-app tse di dirisiwang thata mo RAM go akofisa dinako tsa go bula. Mo di-SSD e aba poelo e nnye mme gantsi e ka timiwa ka polokesego. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_SuperHiddenFiles: E bontsha difaele tsa thulaganyo ya Windows tse di sireleditsweng mo File Explorer. Tse di fitlhilwe ka bonolo go thibela go fetolwa kgotsa go phimolwa ka phoso.
TweakWhy_SuspendAirstrikeAttack: E fitlha UI ya go tlhopha netweke mo skrineng sa go lotlela sa Windows. E thibela go fetola dithulaganyo tsa netweke pele ga go tsena. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_SyncNotifications: OneDrive le batlamedi ba bangwe ba go tsamaisanya ba ka bontsha dikitsiso tsa papatso mo teng ga Explorer. Thibela go fitlha dibenara tseno.
TweakWhy_TailoredExperiences: Uses your diagnostic data to show personalised tips, ads, and recommendations from Microsoft. Disabling opts you out.
TweakWhy_TaskbarCombine: Ka fa dikonopo tsa taskbar di kopantsweng ka teng
TweakWhy_TaskbarEndTask: Tsenya End Task mo menyu ya konteksete ya taskbar
TweakWhy_TaskManagerDetails: E bula Task Manager ka tlhamalalo mo tabo ya Details e e bontshang ditsamaiso tsotlhe go na le pono e e nolofaditsweng.
TweakWhy_TaskViewButton: Konopo ya Task View mo taskbar
TweakWhy_Teredo: Teredo ke prothokholo ya go dira dithanele e e tlamelang ka kgolagano ya IPv6 mo dinetewekeng tsa IPv4. E tlhokega mo kgolaganong ya Xbox Live le ditiriso dingwe tsa balekane. Se ke phetogo e e kotsi thata e e ka nnang thata kgotsa e sa kgonege go e busetsa morago.
TweakWhy_ThisPC: E bontsha kgotsa e fitlha setshwantsho sa This PC mo desktop ya gago go fitlhelela ka bonako di-drive le didiriswa.
TweakWhy_ThumbnailCache: Windows e boloka dipontsho tsa thumbnail mo faeleng ya database e e fitlhilweng go akofisa go bala difolotara. Go tima go thibela cache e go bolokwa mo disk.
TweakWhy_Thumbnails: E bontsha dipontsho tsa ditshwantsho le divideo jaaka di-thumbnail mo Explorer go na le ditshwantsho tse di tlwaelegileng tsa mofuta wa faele. Go tima go bontsha ditshwantsho fela.
TweakWhy_ThumbsDBOnNetwork: Windows e dira difaele tse di fitlhilweng tsa Thumbs.db mo dikabelanong tsa netweke go boloka di-thumbnail. Go tima go thibela difaele tse go dirwa mo mafelong a netweke.
TweakWhy_TitleBarColor: Colours window title bars to match your Windows accent colour instead of showing them in plain white or grey.
TweakWhy_TrayIcons: E bontsha ditshwantsho tsotlhe tsa lefelo la dikitsiso mo tray ya thulaganyo go na le go fitlha ditshwantsho tse di feteletsang kwa morago ga motswako wa go atolosa.
TweakWhy_UnknownNetworks: E beya profaele ya netweke ya tlwaelo e e dirisiwang mo dikgokaganong tse disha kgotsa tse di sa itsiweng fa di lemogwa lantlha. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_UnpinTaskbarShortcuts: Tlosa ditshiamologo tsa taskbar tse di kopantsweng
TweakWhy_UpdateAdobereaderDCSTIG: E dirisa dithulaganyo tsa pholisi ya tshireletso tsa Adobe Reader DC go akaretsa mokgwa o o sireleditsweng, pono e e sireleditsweng, le go tima didiriswa tsa leru le tsa web. E ke phetogo e e nang le kotsi e kgolo e e ka nnang thata kgotsa go se kgonege go e busa.
TweakWhy_UpdateAutoDownload: E laola gore a Windows Update e tla laolola ditlhabololo ka bonako mo lefifing. Go e tima go go letla go tlhopha gore o laolole ditlhabololo leng. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e lekanyeditsweng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiro.
TweakWhy_UpdateCipherSuites: E beakanya di-cipher suites tsa SCHANNEL tse di ratwang go nna di-AES-256 le AES-128 tse di nonofileng. E netefatsa thibelo e e nonofileng ya dikgolagano tsotlhe tsa TLS. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e lekanyeditsweng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiro.
TweakWhy_UpdateDesktopRegistry: E ntsha setshwantsho se sennye sa tshedimosetso se se tlhagang mo desktop fa diwalpapere tsa Windows Spotlight di dirisiwa.
TweakWhy_UpdateDotNetStrongAuth: E patelela .NET Framework 4.x le 2.x go dirisa TLS e e tlwaelegileng ya thulaganyo le thibelo e e nonofileng. E thibela di-app tsa bogologolo tsa .NET go boela kwa di-cipher tse di bokoa. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e lekanyeditsweng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiro.
TweakWhy_UpdateDriver: E laola gore a Windows Update e tla laolola le go tsenya di-driver tsa hardware ka bonako. Go e tima go go letla go laola di-driver ka seatla. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e lekanyeditsweng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiro.
TweakWhy_UpdateEventLogSize: E oketsa bogolo jo bogolo jwa Windows Security event log go 1 MB. E thusa go boloka ditiragalo di le dintsi tsa tshekatsheko pele ga tse di kgologolo di kwalolola.
TweakWhy_UpdateKeyExchanges: E kgontsha di-algorithm tsa Diffie-Hellman, ECDH, le PKCS key exchange mo SCHANNEL. E netefatsa gore phapanyetsanyo ya senotlelo se se sireleditsweng e a bonagala mo dikgolaganong tsa TLS. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e lekanyeditsweng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiro.
TweakWhy_UpdateMicrosoftProducts: Fa e kgontshitswe, Windows Update e tlhola e bo e tsenya ditlhabololo tsa software e nngwe ya Microsoft e e tsentsweng mmogo le ditlhabololo tsa Windows.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSProducts: Fa e kgontshitswe, Windows Update e tlhola gape ditlhabololo tsa dikuno tse dingwe tsa Microsoft tse di jaaka Office. Go e tima go lekanyetsa ditlhabololo go Windows fela.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSRT: E laola gore a Windows Update e tla fa Malicious Software Removal Tool scan. Go e tima go thibela go e romelwa ka Windows Update. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e lekanyeditsweng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiro.
TweakWhy_UpdatePowershell: PowerShell 7 ke kgapetla ya segompieno ya dipolatefomo tse di farologaneng e e nang le tiragatso e e tokafaditsweng le ditiriso go feta PowerShell 5.1 e e tsenngwang mo Windows. E golagantswe le go fetoga ga Telemetry ya PS7.
TweakWhy_UpdateProtocols: TLS 1.0 le 1.1 di tlogetswe mme di na le mathata a a itsegeng. Go di tima go thatafatsa thulaganyo kgatlhanong le BEAST, POODLE, le ditlhaselo tse di amanang. Go di kgontsha gape go tshwanetse go dirwa fela ka ntlha ya go tsamaisana le dilo tsa bogologolo.
TweakWhy_UpdateRegistryPaths: E tlhama ditsela tsa registry tse di tlhokegang ke diphetogo tse dingwe tsa go thatafatsa pele ga di dira. E ke kgato ya pele-pele e e senang tlamorago e e bonalang go modirisi.
TweakWhy_UpdateRestart: E thibela Windows go simolola sešwa ka bonako morago ga go tsenya ditlhabololo ntle le tumelo ya gago. E go fa taolo ya gore go simollwa sešwa go diragala leng.
TweakWhy_UseStoreOpenWith: E bontsha kgotsa e fitlha kgetho ya Sekela sefetlhi mo Microsoft Store e e tlhagang mo khuduthamageng ya Open With ya mefuta ya difaele e e sa amanngwang.
TweakWhy_UWPAccountInfo: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka fitlhelela leina la akhaonto ya gago, setshwantsho, le tshedimosetso e nngwe ya akhaonto.
TweakWhy_UWPApps: E bula dialog ya tlhopho go tlosa kgotsa go busetsa di-app tse di tlhophilweng tsa Windows Store. Ditlosetso dingwe ke tsa tsela e le nngwe, mme le ditsela tse di tshegediwang tsa go busetsa di ka sa ntse di tlhoka Microsoft Store, winget, kgotsa go tsenya sešwa ka seatla. E ke tiro ya kotsi e kgolo ya phutheo go na le go nna fetolo e e motlhofo.
TweakWhy_UWPCalendar: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka bala le go kwala mo data ya gago ya khalendara.
TweakWhy_UWPCallHistory: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka bala histori ya gago ya megala.
TweakWhy_UWPContacts: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka fitlhelela lenaane la gago la dikgolagano.
TweakWhy_UWPDiagInfo: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka kgobokanya tshedimosetso ya tlhatlhobo ka sediriswa sa gago le seemo sa sone.
TweakWhy_UWPEmail: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka bala le go romela imeile mo boemong jwa gago.
TweakWhy_UWPFileSystem: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka fitlhelela difaele gongwe le gongwe mo thulaganyong ya gago ya difaele go feta difolotara tsa tsone. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_UWPMessaging: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka bala le go romela melaetsa ya mokwalo.
TweakWhy_UWPNotifications: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka romela dikitsiso mo senthareng ya dikitsiso ya Windows.
TweakWhy_UWPOtherDevices: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka fitlhelela didiriswa tse dingwe tse di golagantsweng tse di sa akarediwang ke magoro a a rileng.
TweakWhy_UWPPhoneCalls: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka dira le go laola megala.
TweakWhy_UWPRadios: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka laola Bluetooth le didiriswa tse dingwe tsa radio ya sewaelese.
TweakWhy_UWPSwapFile: Faele ya UWP swap (swapfile.sys) e dirisiwa ke di-app tsa Windows Store go paging ya memori ya fantaseng. Go tima go gololesa sebaka sa disk fa o sa dirise di-app tsa Store. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e magareng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiragalo tsa tiro.
TweakWhy_UWPTasks: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka fitlhelela ditiro tsa gago le mananeo a go-a-go-dirwa.
TweakWhy_UWPVoiceActivation: E laola gore a di-app tsa UWP di ka tsenngwa tirisong ka ditaelo tsa lentswe kwa morago.
TweakWhy_VerboseStatus: E bontsha melaetsa e e tletseng ya maemo fa Windows e simolola le fa e tima go na le go bontsha seretse sa tlwaelo fela.
TweakWhy_VisualFX: E laola tlhophiso e e felletseng ya ditiragatso tsa ponalo. Performance e tima ditshisinyego gore go nne ka bonako. Appearance e kgontsha ditiragatso tsotlhe.
TweakWhy_WAPPush: Tirelo ya WAP Push messaging e amogela melaetsa e e tswang mo moyeng go tswa kwa baromelamabaka ba mogala. Ga e tlhokege gantsi mo PC e e sa golagantsweng le neteweke ya mogala.
TweakWhy_WebLangList: E golaganya lenaane la gago la dipuo tse o di ratang le seva sa Microsoft gore diteng tsa webe di tsamaisane le dikgetho tsa gago. E time go oketsa sephiri.
TweakWhy_WebSearch: E tsenya dipholo tsa webe tsa Bing mo kgweetsong ya Windows. Go e tima go dira gore sesepedi sa thulaganyo se bontshe fela difaele tsa selegae le ditlhophiso.
TweakWhy_WhatsNewInWindows: E bontsha di-banner le dikopo tse di bontshang dikarolo tse ntšha tsa Windows morago ga ditlhabololo. E time go thibela dikitsiso tse.
TweakWhy_WiFiSense: WiFi Sense can automatically share your WiFi password with your contacts. Disabling prevents this sharing behaviour.
TweakWhy_Win32LongPathLimit: E ntsha selekanyo sa ditlhaka di le 260 sa tsela ya faele go di-application tsa Win32. E a tlhokega mo ditirisong dingwe tsa tlhabololo le difoldara tse di raraaneng.
TweakWhy_WindowsCapabilities: E bula khuduthamaga ya dikarolo tse di tlhophegang go oketsa kgotsa go ntsha bokgoni jwa Windows jwa jaaka diphuthelwana tsa puo kgotsa didiriswa tsa RSAT. Go boela morago go ka tlhoka phitlhelelo ya Windows Update, difaele tsa motswedi, kgotsa go latelelwa ka go simolola sešwa, ka jalo se se tshwanetse go tsewa jaaka taolo ya diphuthelwana e seng go fetoga fela.
TweakWhy_WindowsColorMode: E beakanya gore Windows shell (taskbar, Start Menu, action center) e dirise mokgwa wa Dark kgotsa Light.
TweakWhy_WindowsFeatures: E bula khuduthamaga ya Turn Windows features on or off go kgontsha kgotsa go tima dikarolo tse di tlhophegang tsa Windows tse jaaka Hyper-V kgotsa Telnet. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e lekanyeditsweng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiro.
TweakWhy_WindowsGameMode: E laola tlhophiso ya Windows Game Mode e e mo teng, e seng tsamaiso ya porofaele ya Baseline ya Gaming. Windows Game Mode e baya ditirwana tsa metshameko pele mme e fokotsa tiragatso ya mo lefifing. Badirisi bangwe ba e tima ka ntlha ya go tsweletsa kgotsa go gatisa gore go se nne le mathata, ka ge diphetogo tsa ntlhatlha di ka dira gore encoder e latlhegelwe.
TweakWhy_WindowsLatestUpdate: E kwadisa PC e go amogela ditlhabololo tsa Windows ka bonako fa di ntshiwa go na le go leta go tsamaisiwa ka iketlo. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e lekanyeditsweng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiro.
TweakWhy_WindowsManageDefaultPrinter: E letla Windows go beakanya ka boyone sekgatisi sa gago se o se dirisitseng bosheng jaaka sa tlwaelo. Go e tima go boloka sekgatisi sa gago sa tlwaelo se o se tlhophileng ka seatla se sa fetoge.
TweakWhy_WindowsSandbox: Motšhine wa boikgethelo o o bobebe o o tlhaotsweng wa go tsamaisa di-application tse di sa tshepegeng go sena kotsi go thulaganyo ya gago e kgolo. E tlhoka Windows Pro kgotsa e e kwa godimo.
TweakWhy_WindowsScriptHost: E laola gore a Windows e ka tsamaisa difaele tsa .vbs le .js script. Go e tima go thibela mefuta e ya script go tsamaya fa e thuntshiwa gabedi. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e lekanyeditsweng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiro.
TweakWhy_WindowsTips: Windows e bontsha dikeletso le dikakantsho tse di tlhagang fa o dira. Go e tima go emisa dikgoreletsi tse.
TweakWhy_WindowsWelcomeExperience: E bontsha tsebe ya kamogelo ya sekerine se se feletseng morago ga ditlhabololo tse dikgolo tsa Windows e e bontshang dikarolo tse ntšha. E time go tlola sekerine se.
TweakWhy_WPBT: WPBT ke tafole ya firmware e e letlang badiri go tsamaisa software fa Windows e simolola. Go e tima go thibela ditirwana tse di tsentsweng ke modiri go tsamaya ka boyone. Phetogo e e na le kotsi e e lekanyeditsweng mme e ka ama dingwe tsa ditiro.
